evidence_paragraphs.snippet: Arya follows the masses. All around her the townsfolk are discussing [her father](wiki:Eddard_Stark) and the rumors of his treason. She pushes through the crowd and finds herself next to the statue...

Arya wants to leave [King's Landing](wiki:King's_Landing), but the seven city gates are either closed completely, open only to entering, or closely guarded by [Lannister](wiki:House_Lannister)...
